fields.name: Maksym Kuniev
fields.summary: Motivated backend developer specializing in building reliable and scalable web applications. Using my experience in systems analysis, I design efficient database architectures, write optimized SQL queries, and implement robust Python code. Have experience working with the Django ecosystem, PostgreSQL, and container deployments (Docker). Quick learner and have a solid foundation in data processing and software design.

fields.technology_stack:
• Python
• Django 
• Django REST Framework (DRF)
• Gunicorn

• Docker, Docker Compose
• GIT, GitHub, GitHub CLI
• Render
• WhiteNoise
• Cloudinary

• Python: Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn
• SQL: PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite
• Python GUI: Tkinter, PyQt6 
• Python ML: scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch

• HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap
• HTMX, AJAX, JavaScript

• MySQL Workbench, PgAdmin 4, DBeaver
• AI-Assisted Development: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, GitHub Copilot
• Web Scraping: BeautifulSoup, Requests

fields.title: Freelance Software Developer | Self-Employed
fields.description:
• Backend & API Development: Developed a custom Python Telegram bot (python-telegram-bot) to provide users with automated, real-time cryptocurrency market updates via a command-based interface.
• Data Extraction: Implemented reliable web scraping pipelines using requests and BeautifulSoup to extract and process live pricing data from CoinMarketCap.
• Frontend Integration: Developing and optimizing responsive web layouts based on HTML5/CSS3 for client projects, resolving user UI inconsistencies, and preparing static pages for seamless integration with the WordPress CMS integration.

fields.title: Foodie App (Recipe Management Platform) | Backend Developer
fields.description: A production-ready Django web application featuring a secure REST API, dynamic frontend interactions, and a containerized deployment architecture.
fields.technology_stack:
• Backend Architecture: Architected and developed a robust RESTful API using Django REST Framework (DRF), incorporating custom object-level permissions and OpenAPI documentation via drf-spectacular.
• Infrastructure & DevOps: Containerized the application and PostgreSQL database using Docker and docker-compose. Deployed the production environment on Render.com utilizing Gunicorn, WhiteNoise for static files, and Cloudinary for media storage.
• Performance & UX: Optimized complex database queries by implementing in-memory caching. Integrated HTMX and AJAX to build a seamless, SPA-like user experience for the favorites system without full-page reloads.
• Testing: Ensured software reliability by designing and implementing a comprehensive suite of automated integration tests using pytest and APIClient.

fields.title: Decision Support System (Bachelor’s Thesis) | Python Developer
fields.description: A desktop analytical application built to process datasets and evaluate alternatives using morphological analysis.
fields.technology_stack:
• Data Processing: Engineered the core calculation logic using Pandas and NumPy to parse Excel datasets, compute parameters, and dynamically rank the best alternatives based on user inputs.
• UI Development: Built a fully functional Graphical User Interface (GUI) in Python using Tkinter for efficient data visualization and user interaction.
• System Design: Conducted full-cycle development, comprehensively documenting the software architecture, system requirements, and user workflows as part of the thesis defense.

fields.title: Kyiv National Technical University
fields.description: • Participated in collaborative academic projects, gaining practical experience in teamwork, task distribution, and version control (Git) within software development lifecycles.

fields.title: Django (Python) Web Framework - The Comprehensive Guide
